slides.title: 환경 설정 개요
slides.caption: 오늘의 공구함 8가지
slides.prompt:
Editorial 16:9 education slide for a Korean tech course.
Content type: section title with toolbox metaphor
Main content: Large Korean headline. Right side shows an illustrated toolbox with 8 numbered tool icons floating out: Node.js hex, Git branch, Cursor editor window, a golden key labelled GEMINI, Python logo silhouette, terminal prompt, a venv sandbox bubble, a 'Hello' speech bubble. All icons in flat vector style on glass cards.
Korean headline (embed at top, large and sharp): "환경 설정 개요"
Korean body text embedded as sharp typography: 오늘의 공구함 8가지 — Node.js · Git · Cursor · Gemini 키 · Python · venv · SDK · Hello
Style: deep indigo (#312e81) to electric blue (#2563eb) gradient background, glassmorphism cards with soft blur and white 10% borders, Pretendard-like Korean sans-serif typography, sharp vector-feel layout, generous negative space, editorial modern. Avoid photorealistic humans, stock imagery, brand logos, cluttered ui screenshots. Aspect 16:9. High resolution. Embed Korean text clearly so a student can read it from 3 meters away.

slides.title: Step 1 · Node.js LTS
slides.caption: winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS
slides.prompt:
Editorial 16:9 education slide for a Korean tech course.
Content type: step guide with terminal command
Main content: Left half: numbered badge '1' big, then a small glass card showing a PowerShell command 'winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS' and below it the verification commands 'node -v' 'npm -v' with sample outputs 'v20.11.0' '10.2.4'. Right half: Node.js hex logo silhouette in subtle teal. All text sharp and readable.
Korean headline (embed at top, large and sharp): "Step 1 · Node.js LTS"
Korean body text embedded as sharp typography: winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS  →  node -v  (v20.x)
Style: dark navy code editor screen (#0f172a) laid over deep indigo gradient background, monospace syntax-highlighted code (teal keywords, amber strings, gray comments), thin window chrome with traffic lights, small filename tab at top, glassmorphism headline chip floating above. Pretendard-like Korean sans-serif for the headline. Editorial modern. Avoid photorealistic humans, stock imagery, brand logos, cluttered ui. Aspect 16:9. High resolution.

slides.title: 환경 점검 체크리스트
slides.caption: 8개 모두 체크되면 졸업
slides.prompt:
Editorial 16:9 education slide for a Korean tech course.
Content type: checklist with 8 items
Main content: Two glass-card columns of a green-check checklist. Each row: a filled green check box icon + Korean label. Rows:
1. node -v  v20+
2. git --version
3. Cursor 실행 OK
4. Gemini API 키 발급
5. echo $env:GEMINI_API_KEY
6. python --version 3.12
7. (.venv) + google-genai
8. python hello.py 성공
Heading 'Module 00 · 체크리스트' at top.
Korean headline (embed at top, large and sharp): "환경 점검 체크리스트"

name: file-organizer

# 파일 정리 Skill
## 절차
1. 대상 폴더 확인
2. 확장자별 분류 제안
3. 중복 탐지
